steps.title: Spot the defining claim
steps.content: The passage states the traditions created “a hybrid dance form.” Hybrid means two different elements blended into one unified whole.

steps.title: Apply the clue to the choices
steps.content: “Intermingled with” directly conveys two things mixing together. The other choices express submission, alignment, or support—none convey the fusion of two traditions. That matches choice B — B is correct.
